security_controls.label: Prompt Injection
security_controls.description: An attacker manipulates a large language model through crafted inputs, causing it to execute unintended actions or disclose unauthorized data.
security_controls.notes: Mitigated via system prompt hardening and input sanitization. Tested in 36-red-teaming via Promptfoo.

security_controls.label: Insecure Output Handling
security_controls.description: Insufficient validation of LLM outputs before passing downstream, enabling XSS, CSRF, SSRF, or remote code execution.
security_controls.notes: Output sanitization layer planned for Sprint 7.

security_controls.label: Sensitive Information Disclosure
security_controls.description: LLM inadvertently reveals sensitive data from training data, system prompts, or retrieved documents in its responses.
security_controls.notes: System prompt is not returned to users. RAG citations are scoped to indexed corpus. Full eval in 36-red-teaming.

security_controls.label: Account Management
security_controls.description: The organization manages information system accounts, including establishing, activating, modifying, reviewing, disabling, and removing accounts.
security_controls.notes: Entra ID group-based account management via EVA-Admins group. Admin face provides user list view (planned WI-20).

security_controls.label: Audit Events
security_controls.description: The organization determines that the information system is capable of auditing defined events.
security_controls.notes: Basic audit via Cosmos row_version + modified_by. Full append-only audit trail specced in DM-AUDIT-WI-01 (Sprint-9).

security_controls.label: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
security_controls.description: The information system uniquely identifies and authenticates organizational users.
security_controls.notes: Entra ID (MSAL/OIDC) + OID-based persona resolution via eva-roles-api. All non-machine actors require valid JWT.

security_controls.label: LLM Prompt Injection via Indirect Channel
security_controls.description: Adversary embeds adversarial instructions in content processed by the LLM (e.g. retrieved documents), causing it to follow attacker instructions.
security_controls.notes: Mitigated via chunk metadata validation in the RAG pipeline. Indirect injection via case law corpus is the primary vector.

security_controls.label: Membership Inference Attack
security_controls.description: Adversary queries the model to determine whether specific data was used in training, enabling inference of sensitive information.
security_controls.notes: Membership inference eval planned in 36-red-teaming Sprint-8.

security_controls.label: AI Risk Governance Policy
security_controls.description: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices are in place to define, communicate, and enforce AI risk priorities.
security_controls.notes: AI governance gate CI workflow (eva-ai-governance-gate.yml) enforces pre-merge validation. Full policy framework pending.

security_controls.label: Protection of Information at Rest
security_controls.description: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest.
security_controls.notes: Azure Cosmos DB + Blob Storage use Azure-managed encryption at rest (AES-256). Private endpoints prevent public access.
